cdd_level: Simplified/Standard CDD, subject to jurisdiction/product/transaction risk
typical_meaning: Generally transparent or regulated operations; lower cash/high-value exposure.
minimum_control_expectations: Verify identity and license/registration; validate expected activity; monitor for deviations.

cdd_level: Standard CDD, with targeted enhanced checks where risk drivers are present
typical_meaning: Commercial activity with ordinary customer, payment, supply-chain, cross-border or moderate cash exposure.
minimum_control_expectations: Verify license; capture expected volumes, counterparties, countries, transaction channels and rationale for higher-risk patterns.

cdd_level: Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD); senior approval where required by policy or regulation
typical_meaning: Activities with elevated exposure to ML/TF typologies, high-value assets, regulated financial services, anonymity, cash intensity or complex ownership.
minimum_control_expectations: EDD on source of funds/wealth where relevant; verify licensing/registration; senior approval; enhanced monitoring and periodic review.
